ddls:
CREATE TABLE "key_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the event occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the event occurred */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the key is pressed (True) or released (False) */,
  "key_code" TEXT /* Key code of the key involved in the event */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Hour of the event in 24-hour format */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minute of the event */,
  "seconds" INTEGER /* Second of the event */,
  "milliseconds" INTEGER /* Millisecond of the event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "key_hold_duration" INTEGER /* Duration (in milliseconds) for which the key was held down */,
  "is_modified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the key press was part of a modified key combination */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context information where the key event occurred */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device from which the event was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_events_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_events_key_code FOREIGN KEY ("key_code") REFERENCES key_codes ("key_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the session occurred */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session ended */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the application */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the application was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Application status (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the application has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_codes" (
  "key_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key code */,
  "key_code" TEXT /* Key code of the key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the key code */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of key (e.g., alphanumeric, function key, control key) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of sessions the user has had with the application */,
  "last_session_date" TEXT /* Date of the last session */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all sessions for the user in the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the application */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the version release */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is the current version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the version has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_versions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_events" (
  "session_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., key press, key release) */,
  "event_context" TEXT /* Context information for the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event (e.g., for key holds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES key_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average session duration, user activity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, user engagement) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., user sessions, system logs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_metrics_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_source" TEXT /* Source of the feedback (e.g., in-app survey, email) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., key press frequency, session duration) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., key events, user interactions) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., performance, user engagement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
